auth.agreePolicies: I agree to BETALENT's Fair Play & Authentic Performance and Content Originality policies.
auth.policyDisclaimer: Fair play and real performance only. No multi-account cheating, fake support, or self-gifting/self-support where disallowed; no stolen or duplicate videos; no deceptive AI or manipulated singing where we require authenticity. We review activity and may exclude from rankings, restrict, suspend, or ban.
auth.fairPlayBody: Every creator deserves a level stage. We don't allow multiple or linked accounts to game rankings or boost yourself, or fake support—including coordinated votes or self-gifting—where the rules don't allow it. Content must be yours: no stolen or duplicate videos, and where we or a challenge require authentic vocal performance, AI-generated or heavily manipulated singing may be restricted or removed. We use detection and human review to keep the platform fair and trustworthy. When rules are broken, we may review your activity, remove unfair support from rankings, restrict features, suspend, or ban. Our goal is a place where talent and authenticity win.
auth.errorAgreePolicies: You must agree to the Fair Play, Authentic Performance, Anti-Fraud, and Content Originality policies to create an account.
welcome.joinSubtitle: Register sign in or Google — email first

upload.title: Upload
upload.errorTitleRequired: Add a caption or an optional title (More options).
upload.hintAcknowledgeRules: Check the box confirming this is your real performance.
upload.hintChallengeNotOpen: This challenge is not accepting entries right now.
upload.hintDurationOutOfRange: Recording length is outside the allowed range for this upload.
upload.errorInvalidFileType: Invalid file type. Use MP4, MOV, or M4V.
upload.errorFileTooLarge: File too large. Check the maximum size allowed.
upload.videoLive: Your video is live. View it now or upload another.
upload.videoProcessing: Your video is processing and will appear in the feed soon.
upload.tryAgainHint: You can change the file or details and try again.
upload.deleteVideoHint: Removes this clip from the composer so you can pick another file or use the studio.
upload.visibilityPublic: Public — anyone can find and watch
upload.checksCopyrightBody: If this is a cover, credit the original artist in Details. We do not guarantee automatic song recognition; you are responsible for rights and licenses.
upload.checksModerationBody: Your performance may be checked by automated moderation. If something looks off, visibility may be limited or the upload removed per our policies.
upload.rightsCheckbox: I confirm I have the rights to publish this performance and I accept the BeTalent Terms of Use.
upload.bgReady: Upload complete — you can publish when ready.
upload.waitForUpload: Wait for the file upload to finish before publishing.
upload.thumbnailHint: Thumbnail is generated automatically after processing.
upload.elementsExtrasHint: Captions and promo cards may be added in a future update.
feed.emptyDescription: Follow creators or explore to see performances here.
